top_signals.title: Philippine Bourse Seeks to Boost Retail Trading With New Reforms
top_signals.summary: The sole stock exchange in the Philippines is preparing a slew of measures including new exchange-traded funds to attract retail investors away from online gambling and cryptocurrency trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Palm Oil Heads for Weekly Gain on India Demand, Biofuel Outlook
top_signals.summary: Palm oil headed for a second weekly advance on expectations for stronger demand from India, and a lift from higher crude prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan’s parliament passes bill to revise retrial system
top_signals.summary: The revised code will prohibit prosecutors from appealing court orders to initiate retrials in principle, while some exceptions will be allowed on sufficient grounds.
